Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Understand User Input: Database Context PostgreSQL with three tables claims adjusters claim_events. Process Flow Ideal R A E P N C. POWL Model Actual Anomalous Defines transitions R A E P N C skip. Loop E P Execute E then either exit or execute P and then E again repeatedly. XOR XOR N skip Partial Order R A loop xor C but with extra edge A C. Task 1 Identify anomalies 2 Generate hypotheses 3 Propose database queries.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2. Deconstruct Task 1 Identify Anomalies Loop between E and P model allows repeated cycles of Evaluation and Approval unusual. XOR skipping N Customer notification optional anomaly. Partial Ordering Edge A C allows claim closed immediately after assignment bypassing evaluation approval notification major anomaly. Lack of strict ordering creates concurrent premature paths.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 3. Deconstruct Task 2 Generate Hypotheses Why the loop E P Business rule change re-evaluation if new info System error Miscommunication. Why XOR skipping N Policy change Technical limitation Incomplete modeling. Why A C edge Duplicate Invalid claims Workflow bypass Modeling error Legacy system migration.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 4. Deconstruct Task 3 Propose Database Queries Query 1 Premature Closure claims with C but no E P or C timestamp before E P. Query 2 Multiple Evaluations Approvals count E P per claim 1 or E after P. Query 3 Skipped Notification claims with C but no N. Refining Queries for PostgreSQL using CTEs window functions.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: 5. Structure the Response Part 1 Identify Anomalies Part 2 Generate Hypotheses Part 3 Database Verification Queries. Self-Correction Refinement during thought Check POWL loop semantics PartialOrder A C edge Queries syntax timestamp comparisons adjusters join possibility.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self-Correction Verification during drafting Anomalies identified Hypotheses generated DB queries proposed Clear structured professional All constraints met.
